tasks.subject: Canonical Forge Hermes/OpenRouter proof
tasks.description: Create /tmp/forge-hermes-proof/proof.txt with content ok, verify it on disk, and return completed JSON with the absolute path in file_changes.

payload.goal: Prove Forge can execute a canonical trusted-VM task on its default Hermes/OpenRouter adapter.

tasks.subject: Produce Forge base-agent readiness report
tasks.description: Inspect Forge runtime config and host prerequisites. Produce a report covering credential store, wallet skill, AIBTC identity, heartbeat, services, and fleet UI readiness without printing secrets.

payload.operator_goal: Determine exactly what remains before Forge can be promoted to the base sibling-agent standard.

tasks.subject: Run Forge AIBTC heartbeat through dispatch
tasks.description: Run the heartbeat script adapter. If host heartbeat is not configured yet, record the blocked prerequisite as the task outcome.

payload.goal: Prove heartbeat is represented as a normal dispatch task with a script adapter attempt.
